rationale: The proposed change concerns Tax Code §11.13(b) homestead exemption amounts. Educ. Code §21.4571 governs TELPAS training requirements for school district employees. The two provisions address unrelated subjects with no overlapping operative text.
quote: Sec. 21.4571. TEXAS ENGLISH LANGUAGE PROFICIENCY ASSESSMENT SYSTEM TRAINING.
_note: No conflict; rule_text is unrelated to the proposed homestead exemption change.
